title: Office Application Spawning Shell or Script Interpreter
description: Detects Microsoft Office applications (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook) spawning command-line interpreters, scripting engines, or network tools. This is a primary indicator of macro-based malware, phishing document exploitation, or DDE attack. Legitimate Office documents almost never spawn cmd.exe or powershell.exe.
falsepositives: Rare: macro-heavy administrative tools built on Office
